global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and engaging headline.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to play a game with friends.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top decorative area
elements.description: A light green area at the top of the ad, providing a background for the logo.

elements.label: Center element 1
elements.description: A small circular icon or button in the center of the ad, possibly representing a game feature.

elements.label: Center element 2
elements.description: Another small circular icon or button in the center, similar to the first one.

elements.label: Top decorative area 2
elements.description: A light green area at the top, complementing the logo area.

elements.label: Center element 3
elements.description: A small circular icon or button located lower in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Center element 4
elements.description: Another small circular icon or button, similar to the previous center elements.

elements.label: Top decorative line
elements.description: A thin line or decorative element at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative line 2
elements.description: Another thin line or decorative element at the top, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Center element 5
elements.description: A small circular icon or button located in the center area of the ad.

elements.label: Center element 6
elements.description: Another small circular icon or button in the center, similar to previous elements.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight' in a prominent position.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'StormByte' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, key elements include a logo, headline, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with circular icons and a call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight, StormByte, Try for free
